content.text:
Implemented the fix for `grpc.lb.backend_service` being unset in subchannel metrics.

Summary:
- Updated `xds/src/main/java/io/grpc/xds/CdsLoadBalancer2.java` so each generated `EquivalentAddressGroup` has `NameResolver.ATTR_BACKEND_SERVICE` set to the CDS cluster name.
- This mirrors the existing locality propagation and ensures `InternalSubchannel` can read backend service from EAG attributes when recording subchannel metrics.
- Wrote a temporary regression assertion in `ClusterResolverLoadBalancerTest`, verified it passed, then removed it as requested.

Validation:
- Initial test run failed due to missing Android SDK; reran with `-PskipAndroid=true`.
- Then build required skipping codegen due to missing C compiler; reran with `-PskipCodegen=true`.
- Final validation passed:

```bash
./gradlew -PskipAndroid=true -PskipCodegen=true :grpc-xds:test --tests io.grpc.xds.ClusterResolverLoadBalancerTest.edsClustersWithLeastRequestEndpointLbPolicy
```

Final working tree:
- Only source fix remains:
  - `xds/src/main/java/io/grpc/xds/CdsLoadBalancer2.java`

No commits were created.
